description: 33 patches across FolderSync, Hidrate Spark, Meetup, Met Office, Tinder, and X, plus a universal PairIP license-check bypass. v1.0.1 adds Tinder swipe-stack ad removal (main + curated), the Likes You Gold upsell crash fix, and Meetup unprompted-paywall suppression. Purchase-breaking Tinder paywall patches and the native-PairIP-blocked X (12.4.1) patches are default-off.
